SUBJECT: Video: bursting at the seams...

NAME,

OK, on Friday I told you about our next video that we're releasing on Monday.

Well, I'm neck deep in editing the video, and I'll be working on it for most of the next 24 hours.

The problem is the same one I always have - I've got too much material... and I'm trying to find a way to squeeze it into the video.

Right now the video is about 20 minutes
longer than I want it to be, so I'm going through tightening up the script... and hoping I don't have to cut too much material.

In any case, we are still on schedule to release the video at noon Eastern time on Monday.

You will be able to [ watch the video here] (link text)

http://www.stompernet.net/gn2

In the meantime, you can join the
conversation and [ let us know what you think ] (link text)
 
http://stomperblog.com/2008/01/04/the-secret-almost-revealed/#respond

best regards,
Andy

P.S. And remember that we've loaded ALL the Going Natural 2.0 videos on our [ "Uber Video Page" ] (link text)

http://stompernet.net/all
